name: contradiction
description: Old-vs-new versions of the same fact. Two pairs stay active-active (both chunks live, newer/higher-trust should out-rank the stale one); two pairs go through Engram.supersede() (the old chunk is marked is_active = FALSE and must be structurally excluded, not merely out-ranked).

queries.query: What Node.js version does the staging server run?
What is the primary deployment region?
What is the API gateway rate limit?
How long is the on-call rotation?
